ground_truth.title: Finance & Accounting Staffing and Recruiting | Robert Half
ground_truth.main_content:
Finance and accounting talent that really counts
Grow your business with skilled accountants, financial analysts and an array of highly skilled professionals who are industry-experienced and proficient in your systems and software.
Hire finance and accounting talent, quickly and easily
Small business? Global enterprise? We'll help you hire the talent you need, often in as little as 48 hours. Our recruiters combine their financial staffing experience with award-winning AI technology to match you with the best-available candidates for your team.
You'll have access to our local market knowledge, finance and accounting connections, and top remote, on-site and hybrid talent through 300+ locations worldwide—all backed by our proven track record of success.
75+ years of specialized staffing experience
10 million+ finance and accounting candidates in our global database
70,000+ accounting and finance professionals placed annually
Finance and accounting support for teams of all sizes
Accounts Payable, Receivable & Bookkeeping
Focus on growth while our professionals help you focus on financial operations, accurate recordkeeping and timely payments to keep your company compliant.
Top roles:
Accounts payable manager
Accounts receivable specialist
Bookkeeper
Billing, Credit & Collections
Strengthen financial health with specialists who help optimize invoicing, credit management and collections to improve processes and reduce outstanding balances.
Top roles:
Billing specialist
Collections specialist
Credit and collections manager
Budget Planning & Financial Analysis
Make better-informed decisions with analysts who deliver data-based insights for strategic planning, performance analysis and budget management.
Top roles:
Budget analyst
Financial analyst
Business analyst
Corporate Accounting
Help stay accurate, timely and compliant using accountants who specialize in financial reporting, general ledger reconciliations and month-end closings.
Top roles:
Senior accountant
Staff accountant
Corporate controller
Payroll
Improve timeliness and accuracy of employee compensation with experienced talent for payroll processing, tax compliance and benefits administration.
Top roles:
Payroll administrator
Payroll specialist
Payroll manager
Internal Audit & Compliance
Reduce risk and enhance operational transparency as governance standards evolve with critical support for high-priority compliance initiatives.
Top roles:
Audit manager
Senior auditor
IT auditor
Hire finance and accounting professionals who understand your industry
Access candidates with industry-specific knowledge and experience. Here are just a few of the sectors we support with finance and accounting talent:
Professional services
Retail and consumer goods
Technology and software
Hospitality and tourism
Financial services and banking
Manufacturing and distribution
Public sector and education
Nonprofit
Flexible support for your big or small business
Choose from a wide array of remote, on-site and hybrid service offerings for a customized talent solution to meet your finance and accounting staffing needs.
Contract talent
Expand your team quickly with short- and long-term finance and accounting professionals (formerly Accountemps) and senior-level professionals.
Permanent talent
Zero in on highly skilled professionals from our network of permanent candidates.
Retained executive search
Pinpoint your next senior leader with a dedicated search team customized to your needs.
How to hire accounting and finance talent with us
Connect.
Choose the approach that works for you: explore candidates online, team up with a specialized recruiter or seamlessly switch between both.
Select.
Our finance and accounting recruiters combine their experience with our award-winning AI to recommend candidates whose skills align with your business needs.
Hire.
We'll work within your internal process to keep things moving, from coordinating interviews to providing salary guidance and onboarding support.
Find an office near you
Work with experienced finance and accounting recruiters in your area to hire remote, on-site and hybrid talent.
Learn how we've helped organizations like yours
A large school district turned to Robert Half for skilled contract accounting professionals to augment its staff during an ERP implementation, and a team to help centralize finance functions.
Our recruiters provided on-site contract professionals to maintain daily accounting and bookkeeping functions during the implementation and cover employee absences.
Robert Half helped a rural manufacturer overcome its limited local talent pool and below-market salary offerings to find accounts payable professionals.
Our recruiters shared compensation and remote hiring strategies to help the company attract and retain skilled accounts payable candidates and clear its outstanding invoice backlog.
A recently acquired restaurant chain worked with Robert Half to hire the skilled accountants and controllers needed to support anticipated double-digit growth.
Robert Half recruiters shared salary guidance and recruiting strategies to attract and retain skilled talent and identified remote and on-site professionals from our large network of candidates.

Frequently asked questions
Robert Half provides specialized staffing services in a variety of professional fields across all industries and company sizes: finance and accounting, technology, marketing and creative, legal, and administrative and customer support. It hires recruiters directly from these fields to understand customer needs and deliver exceptional service.
What does Robert Half specialize in?
Robert Half provides specialized staffing services in a variety of professional fields across all industries and company sizes: finance and accounting, technology, marketing and creative, legal, and administrative and customer support. It hires recruiters directly from these fields to understand customer needs and deliver exceptional service.
Yes. In 2020, Accountemps and other Robert Half businesses were unified under the Robert Half brand. Robert Half continues to provide hiring managers in finance and accounting with contract professionals for their staffing or project needs.
Is Robert Half the same as Accountemps?
Yes. In 2020, Accountemps and other Robert Half businesses were unified under the Robert Half brand. Robert Half continues to provide hiring managers in finance and accounting with contract professionals for their staffing or project needs.
Accounting staff are responsible for recording and reporting a company's financial transactions and helping to ensure compliance with accounting standards and regulations. Typical general accounting duties for staff accountants include:
Preparing journal entries
Assisting with audit fieldwork for both operational and financial audits
Supporting month-end and year-end close
Preparing financial statements, journal entries and account reconciliations
Reconciling and balancing general ledger accounts
Researching and correcting account discrepancies
What do accounting staff do?
Accounting staff are responsible for recording and reporting a company's financial transactions and helping to ensure compliance with accounting standards and regulations. Typical general accounting duties for staff accountants include:
Preparing journal entries
Assisting with audit fieldwork for both operational and financial audits
Supporting month-end and year-end close
Preparing financial statements, journal entries and account reconciliations
Reconciling and balancing general ledger accounts
Researching and correcting account discrepancies
Robert Half offers companies a streamlined, reliable and flexible hiring solution for staffing finance and accounting professionals.
The process begins by gathering job requirements from the hiring manager, allowing the team at Robert Half to understand each role's unique requirements. Each client is then paired with a dedicated recruiter who takes a personalized approach to sourcing candidates, leveraging their local market expertise with AI matching tools to identify talent that aligns with the hiring manager's needs.
Robert Half will then coordinate the interview and selection processes, and negotiate the job offer for the manager and job seeker, providing excellent support throughout the hiring experience.
What are the benefits of working with Robert Half, and how does the process work?

Robert Half will then coordinate the interview and selection processes, and negotiate the job offer for the manager and job seeker, providing excellent support throughout the hiring experience.
